diagrams.title: Binary Semaphore State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows states of binary semaphore (0 and 1) and transitions via wait/signal operations
diagrams.purpose: Understand how binary semaphore controls mutual exclusion

diagrams.title: Producer-Consumer Problem Structure
diagrams.description: Circular buffer with producer adding items and consumer removing items, showing semaphore roles
elements: Arrows showing item flow and synchronization points
diagrams.purpose: Visualize buffer management and synchronization flow

diagrams.title: Semaphore Queue Implementation
diagrams.description: Shows how blocked processes are queued when wait() blocks, and wakeup on signal()
diagrams.purpose: Understand blocking and waking mechanism in semaphore implementation

diagrams.title: Deadlock Illustration
diagrams.description: Two processes P1 and P2 each holding one resource and waiting for the other's resource
elements: Wait arrows showing circular wait: P1→R2, P2→R1
diagrams.purpose: Understand deadlock concept and circular wait condition
